name: 11360-mcp-add-server-fix
_purpose: Fix-in-action evidence for warpdotdev/warp PR #11360. Runs against a build that has PR #10839's predicate (already merged-ready) PLUS this PR's new-server save loop PLUS DEMO-PATCH-B (so SECRETS_REGEX recompiles on toggle ON). Demonstrates: with secret redaction visibly ON, a NEW server save via '+ Add' that embeds `sk-FAKE0000000000FAKEdemoWARP11360fix` in the top-level url is now BLOCKED with the 'contains secrets' toast. Pre-PR this save proceeded silently — see the #11265 reproduction recording. Recipe deliberately uses url (not headers) so the demo isolates this PR's fix and is not confounded by the open #11263 bug (env/headers templatization).
_safety: Token is the deterministic placeholder `sk-FAKE0000000000FAKEdemoWARP11360fix`. Matches the Generic SK regex from custom_secret_regex_list.
_state_touched: Attempts to add MCP entry `demo-11360-fix-url` to MY MCPS via + Add; save is BLOCKED so the entry never lands. Toggles Secret redaction OFF -> ON. Ends with toggle ON.
_phases: A: open Settings, search 'redaction'; confirm toggle starts OFF
B: click toggle ON; wait for 'Secret visual redaction mode' dropdown (DEMO-PATCH-B fires SECRETS_REGEX recompile)
C: navigate to MCP Servers -> + Add -> paste config with sk- in top-level url
D: click Save -> expect 'contains secrets' toast (FIX: PR #11360's new loop runs the predicate on the + Add path)
